text: Turn the compost pile every two weeks so it gets enough air to break down properly.
Balance green nitrogen scraps with brown carbon material like dry leaves in the compost bin.
Finished compost smells earthy and the original food scraps are no longer recognizable.
Use the rear derailleur barrel adjuster to fix a bicycle chain that hesitates when shifting gears.
Keep the bicycle chain lightly lubricated and wipe away the excess oil afterward.
Check the tire pressure before every long bicycle ride to avoid pinch flats.
Feed a sourdough starter with equal weights of flour and water once a day to keep it active.
A long cold proof in the refrigerator develops a deeper, more sour flavor in the bread loaf.
Score the top of the sourdough dough before baking so it can expand without tearing.
